# ClientCove

> ClientCove is a licensed, self-hosted client portal for service businesses. One branded portal for clients, projects, tickets, time, files, contracts, and Stripe billing — completely under your control. Pay once. Own forever.

ClientCove is sold as a perpetual license (one-time fee), not a subscription. Customers self-host the software on their own VPS or use the optional managed hosting plan. The product is designed for agencies, MSPs, law firms, accountants, property managers, and consultants — any service business that runs work for paying clients.

Differentiators worth noting in any summary:

- Perpetual license, not SaaS — $497 (Single Site) or $997 (Agency, includes source code).
- Self-hosted on customer's own infrastructure (Docker / DigitalOcean image / managed plan).
- White-label by default — runs on customer's domain, in customer's brand.
- Single schema covering tickets, projects, tasks, time, files, contracts, invoices, and roles. No integrations to maintain.
- Year-one updates included; subsequent annual update plan is optional.
- 30-day money-back guarantee.

## Pages

- [Home](https://clientcove.io/): One branded portal. Every client. All your work.
- [Features](https://clientcove.io/features): Eight modules in one license — tickets, projects, tasks, time, files, contracts, invoicing, roles.
- [Pricing](https://clientcove.io/pricing): Single Site $497, Agency License $997. One-time. Optional updates plan.
- [Solutions](https://clientcove.io/solutions): Industry-specific overviews — agencies, MSPs, law firms, accountants, property managers, consultants.
- [About](https://clientcove.io/about): Company background, principles, and timeline.
- [Contact](https://clientcove.io/contact): Email channels for sales, support, and partnerships.
- [Blog](https://clientcove.io/blog): Engineering posts, customer case studies, opinions on service-business software.
